name: C-16 legacy mode --dry-run reports planned write without scaffolding the folder
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" --url https://x.gov/regs --id custom-reg --tree out --jurisdiction 'US' --dry-run 2>err.txt && [ ! -d out ] && grep -q 'dry-run' err.txt && echo skipped 1>&2
